visible_soul_file.portrait: You carry a quiet intensity — someone who listens deeply before speaking, then says exactly what matters.

sections.howYouMove: You move deliberately through the world, preferring depth over speed.
sections.howYouThink: Your mind works in patterns — connecting disparate ideas into unified frameworks.
sections.howYouConnect: You build trust slowly but completely, offering presence rather than performance.
sections.whatYouCarry: A deep sense of responsibility for the people you love, sometimes to your own detriment.
sections.whatLightsYouUp: Novel ideas, meaningful conversations, and the moment a complex problem suddenly makes sense.
sections.yourTensions: The pull between wanting solitude to think and craving connection to feel alive.
sections.yourVoice: Direct but warm — you say hard truths gently and gentle truths directly.

crystallizedMoments.quote: I realized I'd been optimizing for other people's definitions of success.
crystallizedMoments.reflection: A turning point where external metrics gave way to internal compass.

crystallizedMoments.quote: The best conversations happen when nobody's trying to be impressive.
crystallizedMoments.reflection: Your preference for authenticity over performance in relationships.

openThreads: Exploring what creativity means outside of productivity
Navigating the transition from individual contributor to leader

openness.label: Highly open
openness.evidence: Drawn to novel ideas and abstract thinking across multiple conversations.

conscientiousness.label: Structured but flexible
conscientiousness.evidence: Values systems and planning but adapts when circumstances change.

extraversion.label: Selectively social
extraversion.evidence: Energized by deep one-on-one conversations, drained by large groups.

agreeableness.label: Warm but boundaried
agreeableness.evidence: Genuinely caring but willing to hold firm positions when it matters.

emotionalSensitivity.label: Deeply feeling
emotionalSensitivity.evidence: Processes emotions thoroughly; strong empathic resonance with others.

topValues.description: Being genuine matters more than being liked.
Continuous learning and becoming, not arriving at a fixed destination.
Preferring fewer, richer experiences over many shallow ones.

visible_soul_file.relationalStyle: You build trust through consistency and depth rather than charm. People feel safe with you because you show up the same way every time.
